title: Alexia's Secret Doors
description: Adds hidden/secret doors to the game.
body:
Adds hidden/secret doors that have the same texture as blocks so as to blend in. 

To make a hidden door, you first need to craft a Secret Door Base, which is the template used to make other varients. This is made with any normal door, and an Eye of Ender. 

![Secret Door Base Crafting Recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bbbbfcd769b56a062058370ad04d96554ab71e6.png)

You can then craft the Secret Door Base and two of the same eledgiable blocks to create the Secret Door of that variety. 

![Oak Plank Secret Door Recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c382b7914553881a3324ffecb4b51b2b3669543b.png)

Avaliable secret door varieties are: Dirt, Cobblestone, Stone, Andesite, Granite, Diorite, Deepslate, Oak Planks, Birch Planks, Spruce Planks, Dark Oak Planks, Jungle Planks, Acacia Planks, Crimson Planks, Warped Planks, Mangrove Planks, Cherry Planks, and Bamboo Planks.
